name: Taupō
eruptionHistory: The 232 CE Hatepe eruption was one of the most violent eruptions in the last 5,000 years. A supereruption ~26,500 years ago (Oruanui) ejected 1,170 km³ of material.
description: Lake Taupō fills a massive volcanic caldera. The Oruanui supereruption ~26,500 years ago was one of the largest on Earth in the last 70,000 years.
